title: PlanFailedPayload (v1)
description: Payload of a `plan_failed` event — plan terminated before completion. See spec/plan-lifecycle-v1.md §5.7.

reason.description: Free-text failure rationale. Consumers MUST NOT parse it semantically.

goal_id.description: Owning goal when the plan served a goal.
